metrolink: Due to a tram fault we currently have a Minor Deley on the Altrincham and Bury Lines.
headlines: Brit competition cops order Google to make search rankings less mysterious
Helpdesk scammers are making house calls to make their lies feel more real

crew_quote: "19 degrees and partly cloudy? Perfect weather for a curry! Just not one of those dodgy ones that make you sorry the next day, like those helpdesk scammers!”
